timeline.title: EPBC Referral 2020/8668
timeline.detail: Valley of the Winds wind farm — Controlled Action

timeline.title: CWO REZ access rights granted
timeline.detail: EnergyCo Central-West Orana REZ access rights awarded — 10 projects, 7.15 GW total

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2029-12 to 2029-12-31 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

scheme_contracts.contract_type: CISA (federal underwriting) — scheme records 936-943 MW; AEMO Gen Info 919 MW

stakeholder_issues.issue: Capacity discrepancy — scheme award vs AEMO nameplate
stakeholder_issues.detail: Scheme records show 936-943 MW awarded under CIS T1; AEMO Generation Information lists Valley of the Winds at 919 MW nameplate. Difference reflects design refinement during the approval process.

stakeholder_issues.issue: Class 1 merits appeal pending against EPBC approval
stakeholder_issues.detail: Federal EPBC approval granted Sep 2025, but a Class 1 merits appeal is pending in the NSW Land and Environment Court. Outcome could delay construction start.

timeline_events.title: CIS Tender 1 underwriting awarded
timeline_events.detail: ACEN Australia's Valley of the Winds wins CIS Tender 1 underwriting — largest NSW T1 wind winner. Scheme records cite 936-943 MW; AEMO Generation Information lists 919 MW.

timeline_events.title: IPC approval (June 2025)
timeline_events.detail: NSW Independent Planning Commission granted approval June 2025.

timeline_events.title: EPBC approval (Sep 2025) — Class 1 merits appeal pending
timeline_events.detail: Federal EPBC Act approval granted Sep 2025. A Class 1 merits appeal is pending in the NSW Land and Environment Court.
